case_title: PALISADES COLLECTION, LLC VS. JOHN SWISS III

docket_entries.description: EXEMPT COLLECTIONS (RULE 3.740), COMPLAINT FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, LLC AS TO DEFENDANT SWISS III, JOHN SUMMONS ISSUED, JUDICIAL COUNCIL CIVIL CASE COVER SHEET FILED PROOF OF SERVICE DUE ON                  MAY-12-2009
DECLARATION RE: VENUE FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, LLC
SUMMONS ON COMPLAINT, PROOF OF SERVICE ONLY, FILED BY PLAINTIFF PALISADES COLLECTION, LLC SERVED NOV-23-2008, PERSONAL SERVICE AS TO DEFENDANT SWISS III, JOHN
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2009 IN DEPARTMENT 212 AT 1:30 PM FOR FAILURE TO OBTAIN AN ANSWER(S) FROM, OR ENTER DEFAULT(S) AGAINST, DEFENDANT(S). NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR DEC-30-2009 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212

SANCTIONS ORDERED IN THE AMOUNT OF $250.00 AGAINST LOURDES SLINSKY, ESQ. FOR FAILURE TO APPEAR AT THE ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING ON: DEC-30-2009, PAYABLE ON OR BEFORE JAN-14-2010. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE SET FOR DEC-30-2009 CONTINUED TO MAR-03-2010 AT 1:30 PM IN DEPT. 212 FOR FAILURE TO ENTER DEFAULT AND DEFAULT JUDGMENT. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
MINI-MINUTES FOR MAR-03-2010 1:30 PM FOR DEPT 212
THERE WAS NO APPEARANCE, NOR OBJECTION FILED. CASE DISMISSED AS TO ENTIRE ACTION BY COURT AT ORDER TO SHOW CAUSE HEARING MAR-03-2010 AT 1:30PM. NOTICE SENT BY COURT.
